why_us.title: Why Jnan Store?
why_us.subtitle: We bring you a blend of authentic taste and luxury presentation for a unique Saudi hospitality experience.

hospitality.title: Saudi Hospitality
hospitality.desc: We offer products carefully selected to represent traditional heritage in your hospitality.

quality.title: Guaranteed Natural Quality
quality.desc: Our products are fresh, free from preservatives and additives, guaranteeing 100% purity.

packaging.title: Luxury Packaging
packaging.desc: Premium and elegant packaging custom designed for gifting and serving guests.

delivery.title: Fast Nationwide Delivery
delivery.desc: We reach you as quickly as possible under strict standards of quality preservation.

testimonials.title: What They Say About Jnan
testimonials.subtitle: We are proud to share reviews from clients who trusted our quality and shared their unique experiences.

faisal.name: Faisal Al-Otaibi
faisal.comment: The Saudi coffee is second to none, cardamom and saffron are perfectly balanced, and the packaging honors your guests.

sarah.name: Sarah Al-Ghamdi
sarah.comment: The Ajwa dates box was an amazing gift for my mother. Superb quality and dates are large and very well stuffed.

abdul.name: Abdulrahman Al-Subaie
abdul.comment: Roasted nuts are fresh and crunchy, and the delivery speed really amazed me. Elegant shopping experience!

nouf.name: Nouf Al-Harbi
nouf.comment: Serving tools and copperware are of excellent quality and design. Great customer service!

brands.title: Partners of Success & Authenticity
brands.subtitle: We take pride in cooperating with the finest local coffee estates and national date factories to ensure premium quality.

instagram.title: Jnan on Instagram
instagram.subtitle: Follow our account for more hospitality captures, special coffee recipes, and open workshop shots.

product.no_reviews: No reviews yet. Be the first to review!

product.not_found_desc: The product may have been removed or the link has expired. You can browse other available products in our store.

newsletter.title: Join Our Newsletter
